judgment.summary: Lam Research is a highly profitable, rapidly growing company with strong returns and a solid balance sheet, trading at a premium valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimates by 7.9%; next earnings date is 2026-07-29.
positives: Revenue growth 23.8% YoY and earnings growth 40.8% YoY indicate strong top-line and bottom-line expansion.
Profit margin 30.9% and operating margin 35.0% demonstrate excellent operational efficiency.
Return on equity 66.8% and return on assets 22.8% show superior capital utilization.
Strong free cash flow of $4.35B (TTM) supports financial flexibility.
Analyst consensus is a buy with a mean target price suggesting upside potential.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 55.22 and forward P/E of 36.83 indicate a high valuation.
PEG ratio of 1.71 suggests growth may not fully justify the current P/E.
Beta of 1.82 implies higher volatility compared to the broader market.

news.paragraph: Lam Research Corporation (LRCX) has no recent headlines to provide immediate context for traders. The stock's price action will likely be driven by broader market trends and its upcoming earnings report. Investors should monitor semiconductor industry news and any analyst commentary ahead of the July 29th earnings release.
